title: Ochnella madagascariensis
taxonomy: Ochnella madagascariensis belongs to the family Ochnaceae, which is a family of flowering plants native to tropical regions. It is classified under the order Malpighiales in the class Magnoliopsida. The family Ochnaceae is further divided into two subfamilies: Ochnoideae and Gomidesioideae. Ochnella madagascariensis specifically falls under the subfamily Ochnoideae. Its classification is still a subject of ongoing research in the field of botany.
